mapper.sql: id, transaction_id, account_id, debit, credit, account_type, created_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO entry ( transaction_id, account_id, debit, credit, account_type, created_at ) VALUES
(#{entry.transactionId}, #{entry.accountId}, #{entry.debit}, #{entry.credit}, #{entry.accountType}, #{entry.createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM entry WHERE transaction_id = #{transactionId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(debit), 0) FROM entry e INNER JOIN `transaction` t ON t.id = e.transaction_id AND t.is_deleted = 0 WHERE e.account_id = #{accountId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(credit), 0) FROM entry e INNER JOIN `transaction` t ON t.id = e.transaction_id AND t.is_deleted = 0 WHERE e.account_id = #{accountId}
